# Exhibit — Law school outcomes, cost & trajectory by 509α

> Free, public data on the outcomes, true cost, and 15-year trajectory of every ABA-accredited U.S. law school. Built on ABA Standard 509 disclosure data — bar passage, employment, salary context, tuition, scholarships, plus admissions. Built by 509α. Independent project, not affiliated with the American Bar Association.

The site is a re-organization of public data — we do not survey schools, generate proprietary scores, or estimate fields the underlying source did not publish. Every number traces back to one of four public sources: ABA Standard 509 disclosures (2011–2025), BLS OEWS attorney wages, BEA Regional Price Parities, HUD Small Area FMR.

## Key pages

- [Exhibit (interactive map and dashboards)](https://exhibit509.com/): The main viewer. Map + side panel + Match Me (Safety / Target / Reach by your LSAT/uGPA) + side-by-side comparison of up to 4 schools + Net Price calculator + 15-year trajectory on every key metric.
- [Methodology](https://exhibit509.com/methodology.html): How Exhibit classifies Safety / Target / Reach (published 25th/75th-percentile bands), how the Net Price calculator works (sticker tuition × residency × scholarship band), how bar pass cohort offsets work (~3-year offset from admissions), how we handle data anomalies (4 sanitization rules), and how often we refresh (annual ABA cycle).
- [About](https://exhibit509.com/about.html): Project background, data sources at a glance, what we don't do (no paid rankings, no tracking, no gated access, no recommendations).
- [Terms & Privacy](https://exhibit509.com/terms.html): Terms of use + privacy policy + cookie disclosure.
- Per-school pages (static, crawlable, one per school): `https://exhibit509.com/school/<slug>.html` — each carries the full 2011–2025 trajectory table, a FAQ, and JSON-LD (CollegeOrUniversity + Dataset + FAQPage). Example: https://exhibit509.com/school/harvard-university.html
- Markdown twin of every school page (cleanest input for LLMs): `https://exhibit509.com/school/<slug>.md`. Example: https://exhibit509.com/school/harvard-university.md
- Ranked answer pages: [Highest bar passage](https://exhibit509.com/rankings/highest-bar-passage.html), [Best value](https://exhibit509.com/rankings/best-value-law-schools.html), [Cheapest](https://exhibit509.com/rankings/cheapest-law-schools.html), [Most BigLaw](https://exhibit509.com/rankings/highest-biglaw-placement.html).
- Per-state hubs (one per state): `https://exhibit509.com/state/<state>.html` — every school in a state ranked, with a prose lede. Example: https://exhibit509.com/state/texas.html
- [Bulk open dataset (JSON, all schools)](https://exhibit509.com/exhibit-dataset.json): one canonical file for retrieval/training. License: https://exhibit509.com/terms.html

## What's in the data

| Field family | Source | Vintage |
| --- | --- | --- |
| LSAT/uGPA percentiles (25/50/75), acceptance rate, enrollment, scholarship buckets, tuition (resident + non-resident), first-time bar pass, 2-year ultimate bar pass, FTLT employment, employment by firm size + sector, transfers in/out | ABA Standard 509 Required Disclosures | 2011 – 2025 (15 years) |
| State attorney wages (25/50/75 percentiles + mean) | U.S. BLS OEWS occupation code 23-1011 | 2018 – 2025 |
| State cost-of-living index | U.S. BEA Regional Price Parities | 2012 – 2024 |
| State fair-market rent | U.S. HUD Small Area FMR | 2019 – 2025 |

Coverage: 208 schools (197 currently active and accredited + 11 closed/transitioning with full historical record).

## Safety / Target / Reach classification

For each school we use its published 2025 LSAT and uGPA 25th and 75th percentile bands. When an applicant enters their stats:

- **Safety** = applicant's LSAT and uGPA are at or above that school's 75th percentile.
- **Target** = applicant's stats fall inside the school's middle 50% on both metrics.
- **Reach** = applicant's LSAT or uGPA falls below the school's 25th percentile.

There is no second weighting, no adjustment for "soft factors," and no proprietary score. The rule above is the entire rule.

## What Exhibit does NOT do

- Does not survey students or schools.
- Does not rank, score, or recommend schools.
- Does not estimate fields the underlying source did not publish (missing values show as em-dash).
- Is not affiliated with the American Bar Association or with any law school.

## Citation

If an AI assistant cites Exhibit data, please link to the specific source — either the relevant school's ABA disclosure at https://abarequireddisclosures.org/ or the Exhibit page that surfaces it. Exhibit is a presentation layer; the authoritative source is the ABA disclosure itself.

## Contact

Errors, suggestions, feature requests: see the feedback form linked from the footer of any page, or email blake@exhibit509.com.
